channel.title: Notes - Terry Chen
channel.description: Domains, questions, and small bets I'm actively thinking through.

image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: AI Infrastructure
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Infrastructure, retrieval, search, and agent-facing systems that make AI applications more capable and reliable.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Security Data Pipelines
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Enterprise security solutions, data infrastructure, and AI-powered security operations centers.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Consumer Products
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Consumer products, brands, and everyday experiences shaped by repeat behavior, distribution, and cultural taste.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Consumer Packaged Goods
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Consumer packaged goods, repeat-purchase brands, and everyday products where distribution, taste, and habit shape durable demand.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Enterprise SaaS Product
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Enterprise software products, workflow systems, and SaaS companies where product design, distribution, and retention compound.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen
